overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through the palace gardens of Beauclair. The scene transitions from an overcast stone pathway near a gothic fountain, through a crowded terrace with NPCs, and up into sunny vineyard hills with mountains and a lake in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved stone pathway near gothic fountain

events.description: clouds begin to part allowing sunlight to filter through

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the curved stone path away from the fountain structure

entered.detail: ornate stone archway with water basin and gothic detailing
weathered cobblestone path curving along the hillside
dense crimson azalea bushes lining the path
tall stone retaining wall covered in green ivy

segments.scene_description: Geralt begins walking along a curved cobblestone path beside an ornate gothic fountain. The weather is overcast with clouds beginning to part. Red flowering bushes line the left side of the path while ivy-covered stone walls rise on the right. No other characters are present in this quiet garden corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone terrace with balustrades and central statue

events.description: exiting the curved pathway onto the open stone terrace
sun fully breaks through clouds illuminating the terrace and crowd

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the terrace crowd toward the central stairs

notable_agents.action: child in green shirt running across the terrace
group of adults in colorful clothing conversing near the balustrade

entered.detail: low stone wall with decorative pillars overlooking the gardens
tall slender stone monument with spire top
stone seating along the terrace edge

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges onto a wide stone terrace filled with NPCs in colorful Renaissance-style clothing. The sun breaks through the clouds, illuminating the scene. A tall spire statue stands at the terrace center, and stone balustrades line the right side. The crowd moves in scattered patterns across the paved terrace.

events.description: beginning to ascend the wide stone staircase

agents.ego_description: Geralt climbing the stone stairs past other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in purple dress and white hat walking down the stairs

entered.detail: wide stone steps with worn surfaces leading upward
low stone barrier along the stair edge

segments.scene_description: Geralt begins ascending a wide stone staircase flanked by walls and railings. The terrace crowd thins out as he climbs. A woman in a purple dress descends the stairs toward him. The tall spire statue recedes to the left as the vineyard hills become visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: vineyard hillside with grape rows and water wheel

events.description: exiting stone architecture into the vineyard countryside
ground surface changes from stone pavement to dirt path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the dirt path between rows of grapevines

notable_agents.action: worker in simple clothing tending to grapevines near stone wall

entered.detail: terraced rows of grapevines on the hillside
narrow dirt trail between the vine rows
wooden water wheel attached to stone building with water flowing

segments.scene_description: Geralt leaves the stone stairs behind and enters a sunny vineyard landscape. The ground changes to a dirt path winding between dense rows of grapevines. A stone water wheel structure appears on the right with water flowing. Workers are visible tending to the vines along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside vineyard path with mountain views

events.description: lake and snow-capped mountain range become visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the vineyard path with scenic mountain backdrop

notable_agents.action: worker kneeling to tend vines beside the path

entered.detail: calm blue lake visible through the vineyard rows
snow-capped mountains rising behind the lake

segments.scene_description: The path opens to reveal a stunning view of a blue lake and snow-capped mountains in the distance. Geralt continues along the dirt trail between the vineyard rows. Workers tend to the grapes along the path. The stone water wheel recedes behind as the landscape opens to the panoramic vista.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet, overcast garden corner into a sprawling, sun-drenched vineyard landscape. It begins with Geralt walking along a curved cobblestone path beside an ornate gothic fountain, flanked by red flowering bushes and ivy-covered walls under a cloudy sky. As the clouds part and the sun breaks through, the scene opens onto a wide stone terrace bustling with NPCs in colorful Renaissance clothing around a central spire statue. The camera then follows Geralt as he ascends a wide stone staircase, leaving the crowd behind and passing a woman in a purple dress before the stone architecture gives way to a sunny vineyard. Finally, the path shifts from stone to dirt, winding past a flowing water wheel and vineyard workers before expanding into a panoramic vista of a blue lake and snow-capped mountains.
